title: triticum repens subsp. intermedium
intro: Triticum repens subsp. intermedium, also known as intermediate wheatgrass or intermediate wild wheat, is a subspecies of the perennial wheatgrass that grows in North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum repens subsp. intermedium include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support healthy living.
